productDisplayName: Nike Men White Capri II Casual Shoe
description: Comfort junkies do not have to compromise on style any longer! These nike II Capri shoes effortlessly combines style with soft, padded instep comfort. Featuring texture, stitch and overlay details and a low-top ankle, the nike Capri II sneakers are a great add-on to your shoe closet. Wear this with your favourite denims and a tonal tee. Upper Synthetic upper for absolute durability Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit with stylish two-tone laces Highly padded mesh tongue and collar for all-day comfort Knitted waffle pattern panels on sides for great casual style Embroidered branding on back heel and brand tab on tongue Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Straight line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stability Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
